query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_vendas,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN brokerVendedor IS NOT NULL AND brokerVendedor != '' THEN 1 END) as com_vendedor,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN brokerAngariador IS NOT NULL AND brokerAngariador != '' THEN 1 END) as com_angariador,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN (brokerVendedor IS NULL OR brokerVendedor = '') AND (brokerAngariador IS NULL OR brokerAngariador = '') THEN 1 END) as sem_nenhum
FROM sales;

  COUNT(CASE WHEN (brokerVendedor IS NULL OR brokerVendedor = '') AND (brokerAngariador IS NULL OR brokerAngariador = '') THEN 1 END) as sem_nenhum
